name: Jennifer Parmentier
background: Ms. Parmentier has served as Chief Executive Officer since January 2023 and Chairman of the Board since January 2024. She previously served as Chief Operating Officer from 2021 to 2022 and Vice President and President – Motion Systems Group from 2019 to 2021.

commpanies.name: Parker-Hannifin Corporation
commpanies.title_or_role: Chief Executive Officer, Chairman of the Board
